series_description: Used for claiming reimbursement for in-state and out-of-state travel.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year after official audit report has been received from Auditor of State.
Paper: Retain as active file. Periodically review and discard obsolete material

series_description: Forms used by a person/organization to enter into contract with an agency to request payment for services or to amend contract. May include attendance forms, correspondence, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year after official audit report has been received from Auditor of State

series_title: PROPOSED AND ADOPTED RULES AND ASSOCIATED RULE-MA
series_description: Proposed and adopted rules and associated rule-making documents filed with LSC. Associated rule-making documents include Rule Summaries and Fiscal Analyses,public hearing notices, agency rule-making guides, non-compliance notifications, executive orders, additional communications, and withdrawal/TBR letters.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain on server until transferred to CD-ROM storage and CD-ROMs have been checked for quality and completeness. Maintain one set of CD-ROMs in LSC Rules Unit and send a duplicate set of CD-ROMs to State

series_description: File contains all adopted rules currently in effect.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until recinded or superseded by amendment

series_description: Record of all actions taken on each administrative rule. (1982-2000).
Expenditure documents. Authorize payment to a vendor for goods and/or services received.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year after official audit report has been received from Auditor of State.

series_description: Transient material includes all communications by LSC staff conveying information of temporary importance made in lieu of oral communication including telephone, voicemail, instant and text messages, social media posts maintained on the social media website, and shared calendars.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Versions of bills, supporting bill documents, such as bill analyses, fiscal notes, synopses, specialized budget bill descriptive documents, such as redbooks, comparison documents, budget in details), and public testimony kept by the LSC staff members who staffed the committee. Generally documents are preserved in two series: Bills (with testimony) and Analyses (the supporting bill documents), corresponding to each biennial session of the Ohio General Assembly.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in LSC computer area for four years; transfer to LSC Library Files to keep for another four years. Materials are to be microfilmed, but beginning with the 123rd General Assembly the Bill Series, and beginning with the 126th General Assembly, the Analyses series, the documents are scanned as tiff or pdf images. Check Microfilm or tiff images for quality and completeness. After 8 total years the paper files may be disposed. ; Electronic: Machine readable documents related to the bill files shall be converted to tiff or retained as pdf images and merged with the appropriate series of scanned paper documents. Machine readable documents available to the librarian and related to bill files are available from multiple sources and many are copies of paper documents in the physical bill file that are saved for a total of 8 years. The machine readable copies available to the librarian may be erased upon the completion of the process to create the tiff or pdf images, proofing for quality and completeness, and the creation of the DVD and an online archive on an LSC network drive. Maintain copy of tiff or pdf images in library on DVD and in an online archive on an LSC network drive; deposit a DVD of tiff or pdf images to the State Archives ; Microform: Maintain copy of microfilm in library; deposit original microfilm at State Archives.
disposition: Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Archives ; Microform: Archives

series_description: Use budget journals to allot funds for the first time after appropriation. Use budget transfers to move allotted funds at the account level within an appropriation line item.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year after official audit report has been received from Auditor of State. ; Electronic: Retain 1 year after official audit report has been received from Auditor of State.

Paper: Microfilmed periodically; continually maintained in Director''s office in paper format ; Microform: Microfilm is continually maintained in LSC Library from 1947 to 1/22/2003. Security copy of microfilm to State or other offsite storage site. ; Electronic: Beginning with 10/14/2003 minutes are scanned in a tif format. Additionally all previous minutes that were microfilmed were also scanned. Agency continually maintains a DVD of tif images and an online archive of tif images in a directory managed by the LSC Library. Security copy of DVD to State Archives or other offsite storage site
disposition: Paper: Permanent ; Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent Archives

series_description: Official correspondence of LSC Director that pertains to LSC policy or responsibilities.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain as active file in Director''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''s office each two year period corresponding to session of General Assembly. After two year period, retain as inactive file in Director''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''s office for use as needed ; Electronic: Retain as active file in Director''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''s office each two year period corresponding to session of General Assembly. After two year period, retain as inactive file in Director''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''s office for use until the Director determines it is no longer needed; there is no specific time period to keep the materials.

series_description: All records which document or are the basis for a payroll including time and overtime reports.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year after official audit report has been received from Auditor of State

series_description: Memos from Director, Deputy Director, or other senior staff that set forth office policies or procedures.
retention_statement: Microform: Continually maintain microfilm in LSC Library ; Electronic: Beginning with records for 2002, during fifth year convert to tif images. Beginning wiht records for 2014, during fifth year convert to pdf images. Erase original files after converted images have been checked for quality and completeness. Continually maintain DVD of images and online archive of images in the LSC Library ; Paper: Retain as active file in Director''s office for four years. During fifth year, microfilm for Library retention. Destroy hard copy after microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness. Beginning with records for 2002, during the fifth year convert to tif images. Beginning with records for 2014, during the fifth year convert to pdf images. Recycle original files after converted images have been checked for quality and completeness. Continually maintain DVD of images and online archive of images in the LSC Library
disposition: Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Recycle

series_description: Includes performance evaluations, original payroll action sheets, deduction authorizations, letters relating to job performance, job audits, etc.
retention_statement: Microform: Prior to 2010, after 5 years post-termination, relevant documents were microfilmed; microform records stored in the LSC safe. Beginning in 2010, relevant documents scanned into PDF format; permanently stored in online-archive on the LSC network. Paper copies and originals destroyed after microform or electronic copy checked for quality and completeness. ; Electronic: Prior to 2010, after 5 years post-termination, relevant documents were microfilmed; microform records stored in the LSC safe. Beginning in 2010, relevant documents scanned into PDF format; permanently stored in online-archive on the LSC network. Paper copies and originals destroyed after microform or electronic copy checked for quality and completeness. ; Paper: Retain file for each employee while employed by or on official leave from LSC. Keep as inactive file for 5 years after termination.
disposition: Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
